parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.N8N_FROM_EMAIL, to: $json.email, subject: 'Welcome to AKCC', html: '

Welcome to AKCC!

Hi ' + $json.fullNameHtml + ',

We are so glad you have joined the Australian Kachin Christian Church community. You can now access sermons, events, and more.

We look forward to worshipping with you.

Australian Kachin Christian Church

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.N8N_FROM_EMAIL, to: $env.ADMIN_EMAIL, subject: 'New Member: ' + $json.fullNameHtml, html: '

A new member has signed up:

Name' + $json.fullNameHtml + '
Email' + $json.emailHtml + '
User ID' + $json.userId + '
' }) }}

meta.notes: Import into n8n, then: (1) activate the workflow, (2) ensure N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET / RESEND_API_KEY / N8N_FROM_EMAIL / ADMIN_EMAIL are set in deploy/n8n/.env, (3) set N8N_WEBHOOK_URL in Vercel to https://<your-n8n-domain>/webhook/akcc
